title: RPG Bonfire
description: Add the ability to regenerate health near a campfire in Minecraft with a simple key press!
body:
### **What is RPG Bonfire?**
This mod introduces a unique RPG-like health regeneration mechanic to Minecraft. No more carrying stacks of food or potions - just approach a campfire, press the designated key, and feel the warmth restoring your strength.

#### **Features:**
- Regenerate health with a single key press.
- Campfires now serve as both a light source and a survival tool.
- Works seamlessly with other mods to enhance your game experience.
#### **How to use:**
1. Approach a campfire in the game.
2. Ensure you're within the regeneration radius (default 1 block).
3. Press the designated key (default [**X**]) to restore your health.

~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~~~—~~

This mod is perfect for players who enjoy a cozy survival atmosphere <3
